craigslist.title: Settle for nothing but the best: 2 BR, 1 BA awaits.
craigslist.location: 3900 Olympic Blvd near King Ave W/Shiloh Rd
craigslist.full_address: 3900 Olympic Blvd near King Ave W/Shiloh Rd, Billings Settle For
craigslist.geocode_query: 3900 Olympic Blvd near King Ave W/Shiloh Rd, Billings Settle For
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Shiloh Glen Leasing Office: 3900 Olympic Blvd Billings, MT 59102 Call us at show contact info Take a look at what Shiloh Glen has to offer! Shiloh Glen offers a peaceful setting with all the conveniences of the city. Enjoy being close to parks and trails and just across the street from some of the best dining and shopping in Billings. The property is just a short drive from the airport and the premier Shiloh Crossing Shopping Center, where new retail and restaurants are continually added. Choose from spacious studio, one-, two- and three- bedroom floor plans featuring air conditioning and patio or deck with storage. As a resident, you will enjoy great amenities including a laundry center, outdoor picnic area, and brand-new playground. Find out more and let us help you find your new home today! Rental Information: 2 Bedroom / 1 Bathroom / 804 sq ft Monthly Price: $1390 - $1490 *Optional and usage-based charges not included. Contact office to confirm pricing details and included fees. Lease Terms: 6-Month, 7-Month, 8-Month, 9-Month, 10-Month, 11-Month, 12-Month Apartment Amenities: − Carpet − Deck − Dining Room − Dishwasher − Kitchen − Oven − Patio − Range − Refrigerator/Freezer − Views − Air Conditioning − Cable Ready − Vinyl Flooring − Walk-in closet in select homes − Wheelchair Accessible (Rooms) − Window Coverings Additional Information: − Brand-new playground − Garages available − Laundry Facilities − Maintenance on site − Outdoor Entry − Playground − Porch − Private Mailboxes − Reserved parking − Resident Manager − After Hour Lighting − After Hour Maintenance − Close to Parks − Close to Public Transportation − Close to Restaurants − Close to Schools − Close to Shopping − On-Site Leasing Office − Storage Space Leasing Hours: Mon - Fri: 8:30 AM - 4:30 PM Saturday Closed. Sunday Closed. Call us at show contact info Pet Policy: 2 pets max per home, $50 pet rent per pet, $400 refundable deposit per pet, Call for breed restrictions Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Shilohglenapartments/?rcstdid=MzM%3D-dkCsfkCKtXI%3D Website: www.apt-rental.com?n=shiloh_glen&rp=s2CKHbrvecXW&t=wb Online Application: www.apt-rental.com?n=shiloh_glen&rp=s2CKHbrvecXW&t=ap Schedule a Tour: www.apt-rental.com?n=shiloh_glen&rp=s2CKHbrvecXW&t=sch All pricing, availability, fees, and terms are subject to change without notice.
